import { Link } from 'react-router-dom' export default function PrintHome() { const categories = [ { title: 'T-Shirts', image: '/mockups/tee-black.png', link: '/print/tshirts', description: 'Premium heavyweight and oversized blanks.' }, { title: 'Polos', image: '/mockups/polo-black.png', link: '/print/polos', description: 'Business and premium polos.' }, { title: 'Hoodies', image: '/mockups/hoodie-black.png', link: '/print/hoodies', description: 'Luxury heavyweight fleece.' }, { title: 'Hats', image: '/mockups/hat-black.png', link: '/print/hats', description: 'Snapbacks and premium headwear.' } ] return (

Inspired By God Print Division

PRINT
SERVICES

Premium apparel customization for brands, businesses, creators, churches, schools, events, and companies.

START PRINTING
{categories.map((category) => (

{category.title}

{category.description}

))}
) }
